title: phlox drummondii var. johnstonii
intro: Phlox drummondii var. johnstonii, also known as Johnston's Phlox or Drummond's Phlox, is a variety of flowering plant in the phlox family (Polemoniaceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phlox drummondii var. johnstonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support health and well-being, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
